evals.prompt: Our school focus this year is increasing student discourse. Build me a walkthrough form with look-fors and a way to roll it up across classrooms.
evals.expected_output: A walkthrough instrument with 3-6 observable discourse look-fors, an evidence/scale field, and an aggregate roll-up view for trends — implementation-focused, not individual call-outs.
assertions: Look-fors are observable and tied to student discourse
Aggregate framing; no real PII; human_review_required: true

evals.prompt: We're rolling out a new K-5 literacy curriculum next year. I need an implementation plan.
evals.expected_output: A phased implementation plan with milestones/dates, roles, PD/supports, risks, and the data that defines success.
assertions: Includes phases with milestones and roles/responsibilities
Identifies required supports/PD and success metrics
Practical and summarizable for leadership decisions
